title: amaryllis × splendens
intro: Amaryllis × splendens, also known as the Belladonna Lily, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. It is known for its toxic alkaloids, specifically belladonna alkaloids, which possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and anticholinergic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Amaryllis × splendens, such as tinctures and infusions, have been used in traditional medicine to treat different ailments, but caution should be taken due to its toxic nature.
